current_milestone: Phase G.5 (The Bazaar) complete — discovery + reputation + escrow chain verified
notes: Phase G.5 end-to-end verified. bazaar_trade demo runs a full four-stage escrow over MCP: alice advertises capability.offers, bob discovers via recall(filters.predicate='capability.offers'), bob checks alice's reputation via recall(filters.reputation_of=...), bob pays (escrow.payment causes=[offer]), alice delivers (escrow.delivered causes=[payment]), bob settles (escrow.settled outcome='accepted' causes=[delivered]). walkEscrowThread returns 4 stages in order; isEscrowSettled=true. Vitest 120/120 green. Five-tool MCP API unchanged — all Bazaar primitives ride on existing believe/recall/attest + belief.causes[]. Phase-1 regression + all arena gates re-run green. Next: G.6 The Throne — compose all arena features into one integrated demo.
